ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the investment */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "portfolio_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the portfolio allocated to this investment */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held for the investment */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the investment */,
  "change_in_shares" INTEGER /* Change in the number of shares held since the last reporting period */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in the number of shares held */,
  "quarter_end_price" TEXT /* Price of the stock at the end of the quarter */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., 13F filing) */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which the investment belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the investment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the investment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_company_name FOREIGN KEY ("company_name") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the portfolio */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark_index" TEXT /* Benchmark index used to compare portfolio performance */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the portfolio */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manager */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in investment management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the performance was recorded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the investment on the recorded date */,
  "change" TEXT /* Change in price since the last recording */,
  "volume_traded" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the recorded date */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield of the investment on the recorded date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_performance_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)
